statement: In every magma, Equation 2170 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * (z * y)`) implies Equation 4640 (`(x * y) * x = (y * z) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0422
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) (op z y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op (op x y) x) = (op (op y z) z)
